message:
bd-hye0: add npm-publish CI job + fix dead code in fnx witness

- Add npm-publish job that triggers on v* tags
- Job checks if version already exists on npm before publishing
- Uses NPM_TOKEN secret for authentication

Also fixes dead code bugs in build_fnx_witness and
build_fnx_validation_witness functions where unreachable branches
checked fnx_enabled after an early return had already handled the
disabled case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ name: CI
 on:
   push:
     branches: [main]
+    tags: ['v*']
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
 
@@ -1025,3 +1026,56 @@ jobs:
         with:
           name: coverage-lcov
           path: lcov.info
+
+  npm-publish:
+    name: Publish to npm
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [wasm-build]
+    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          targets: wasm32-unknown-unknown
+
+      - name: Install wasm-pack
+        uses: jetli/wasm-pack-action@v0.4.0
+
+      - name: Install wasm-opt (binaryen)
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y binaryen
+
+      - name: Build optimized WASM package
+        run: ./build-wasm.sh
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
+
+      - name: Check if version already exists on npm
+        id: version_check
+        run: |
+          PKG_NAME=$(jq -r '.name' pkg/package.json)
+          PKG_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' pkg/package.json)
+          echo "Package: $PKG_NAME@$PKG_VERSION"
+          if npm view "$PKG_NAME@$PKG_VERSION" version 2>/dev/null; then
+            echo "Version $PKG_VERSION already exists on npm, skipping publish"
+            echo "skip=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "Version $PKG_VERSION not found on npm, will publish"
+            echo "skip=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Publish to npm
+        if: steps.version_check.outputs.skip != 'true'
+        run: |
+          cd pkg
+          npm publish --access public
+        env:
+          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
